conversation.message_text: Igloo: Welcome to Igloo! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Igloo: Hey this is Sarah, how can I help you?
Hello, do you all have any discounts for first time buyers?
Still there?

Igloo: Good morning! Thank you for patiently waiting! You can use the code ATTJH3PTY8 for 10% off. Let me know if there's anything else I can help with, and in the meantime, check out our best sellers here: https://igloo.attn.tv/ay2963R08R5c

Do you guys plan on fixing the color issue on the Wonder Woman cup? A lot of complaints in the review about the red color being more of an orange, I was about to buy it too until I saw that it wasn't red like it should be.
Template used: "Feedback 1 - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 18:03:27.339

Igloo: Thank you for bringing this to our attention! I'm sorry for the trouble. I understand the concern, color can sometimes appear slightly different depending on screen settings, lighting, and the printing process.

That said, we truly value the feedback we've received and are continuing to monitor comments about the shade to ensure we're meeting expectations as closely as possible. Customer feedback means a lot to us and helps us keep improving. I truly appreciate you sharing this, and I'll be sure to pass it along to our team for future consideration. 

Please let me know if you need anything else. I'm happy to help.

Gardner White: Hey, this is Jordan. Thanks for checking out our site! https://gw.attn.tv/ax7JDofDKEB1 

Any questions I can answer for you?
Yes, my order in yet?

Gardner White: You'll get a tracking email as soon as your order ships. If you don't see it in your inbox, be sure to check your spam and promo folders; sometimes our emails end up there as well! 

Please note that we have a wide delivery area across Michigan. We deliver to our regular delivery area 7 days a week, and other select areas on specific days of the week. If you live outside of our delivery area then we usually ship via UPS or FedEx and once shipped, it will take 7-10 business days to receive your order. Oversized items may take longer, 14-21 business days. Were you given a timeframe for delivery?
Yes, also paid for delivery, set up and removal of old recliner.
Template used: "Did I order already? - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 16:42:51.099
Template used: " Can I track my delivery truck?"; last updated: 2023-02-02 23:49:29.670

Gardner White: Thank you for letting me know. I'm sorry for the trouble. I'm afraid I don't see the order on my side, but this could be due to my limited system. Did you received a confirmation email or is there a charge on your account? Sometimes the email might arrive in your spam or promo folder, so be sure to take a look there too! 

Just a heads up, on the scheduled day of your delivery/service, you will get a text and email with a three-hour window of when to drivers expect at your house. If you're scheduled for daytime you will be contacted the night before or early in the morning with your timeframe. If you're scheduled for evening you will be contacted in the afternoon (between 3pm and 5pm) with your timeframe. After that happens you can then use the Track Your Truck tool: https://gw.attn.tv/avkVFcxUlx76

It will let you know what stop you are in the lineup, what the expected time for arrival is, and where your truck is at the moment.

send_to_cs: If escalated do NOT send to CS
escalate: ESC if a cx wants to purchase an out of stock item
ESC if cx want someone from the cs team to call them directly
ESC when a cx asks for a call back
ESC if uncertain about refills or product specific questions
ESC if cx has issues registering
ESC if cx asks for help putting through an order
tone: Close the convo once the client takes over
Don't use too many exclamation points
Use more formal language such as "Hello" instead of "Hey"
Avoid responding to anything related to politics
dos_and_donts: Always use your VPN when accessing their website & make sure you're sending US links
Don't ever release information on personnel related to the company
Don't share any authorized retailers, only boutiques
Don't ask cx to leave product reviews as they don't collect them
drive_to_purchase: When D2P'ing, do not send links of the search results page, send either a related collection or product page

browsingHistory.item: iO Series 2 Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush Starter Kit, Night Black

important: When sending a link, if you see a "/" at the end of the URL, remove it
send_to_cs: Send to CS for damaged items that aren't available on the website
escalate: ESC immediately if the order is delivered, but cx did not receive it
ESC if cx wants to use an expired code
ESC sales end date questions
ESC invalid codes / expired code issues
Before ESC for retroactive discount requests, check if the item is on sale or if they met the minimum
Don't make suggestions of replacements - if unsure, ESC
ESC false advertising complaints
ESC if cx state they regret placing the order after the CANCEL/ORDER temp has been sent
Before ESC products not functioning properly
→ Inquire what exact brush/product they have
→ Provide any user guides available
Don't ask for the cx's shipping address as secondary info, include their phone number instead
tone: Keep messages shorter and more direct
Don't use the term "cart tracking", or let cxs know we can see what they have in their cart
templates: If the cx asks where there order is, and it's a confirmed order within the standard processing and shipping time, only share the "Order status/order tracking" temp
If the cx reaches out saying they're having issue with their code, first use CWW temp
If cx needs assistance with brush function/operations use FOQ shortcut
For product complaints/bad experiences use PBE shortcut
If cx says they're dentists/hygienists & want to shop use RDH shortcut
If cx is a short amount away from reaching the $100 threshold for the welcome discount to apply use SRT shortcut
If cx ask why their order was canceled, use MOC shortcut
If cx purchased from their dentist and looking for rebate ($30, $20, $10 back) use RBT shortcut
For post-purchase issues with Amazon orders, use PS shortcut
For post-purchase issues where cxs are dental professionals, dentists, hygienists, use DPS shortcut
dos_and_donts: If customers are looking for brush heads always confirm what type of brush they have, iO or non iO
If you can't find the products on the website, refer to this one https://crest.com/en-us
Hold to policy and do not offer to check if deviation from policy is acceptable
If customers ask about the warranty registration code OR say it's not accepting theirs (they might refer to it as a promo code for registration)- send them this one OB59185 (it's always the same)
drive_to_purchase: For general recommendations use CFR shortcut
Always refer cxs to iO series products, when possible
promo_and_exclusions: The $85 welcome promo code isn't for % off, once applied a free item is added to the cart
Please check the last letters of a code to determine when they were sent
→ I.e. WCOBDC means it is a December code (DC) and will likely expire in Jan
Discount codes do not work on Amazon
If cx is looking for a discount on replacement brush heads, encourage to subscribe for savings on the product page

escalation_preferences: All product complaints or bad experiences with a product

conversation.message_text: Oral-B: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Oral-B.
Oral-B: Welcome to Oral-B! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Oral-B: Hey! I'm Sam with Oral-B and Crest! Just wanted to say thanks for joining. If you're looking for great savings check out our Deals page! https://oral-b.attn.tv/alwQWb7sfQrZ 

Text me any time with questions!
Hi Sam, I bought a Oral-B genius 6000 to 9000 electric toothbrush a couple years ago. I would like to replace that with the same thing. Can you help me?
I wanna replace it with one that has a charging station with a cord to plug-in
What would you recommend?

Oral-B: I'd be happy to help! We only offer Oral-B Genius 7500 and Genius X in the Genius Series at this time. You can find them here: https://oral-b.attn.tv/af_44A3ywiRQ I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock on the other options, but I recommend checking our website and social media frequently. Let me know what you think!
Do both of them have a plug-in cord to recharge that is what I am looking for
Oral-B: Yes, a charging station is included. Let me know if you need help with anything else!

send_to_cs: If the cx sends us their credit card information (written or screenshot) and it's an issue we can't resolve - send the customer to CS
➜ Do NOT ESC any conversation that contains this type of information in the thread
escalate: When you ESC use ESC shortcut fisrt
ESC if the charge on cx account is pending

Sam Edelman: Thank you for reaching out, and I totally understand your concern regarding shipping. While I can't guarantee any delivery dates, our processing time takes 1-2 business days, and once shipped, it will take 3-7 business days for domestic orders and up to 18 business days for international orders. 

You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://samedelman.attn.tv/aHq3WcDtw-G8 We appreciate your understanding on this!
